commit_message: Try to fully drain the pending list when the transport requests a refill -
Fixes for idle transport tracking -
Added assert that we are not doing blocking calls from a dispatch queue  also dispatch the result of an async request on the original dispatch queue on which the request was made on -
fixed build
Small improvements in case of non standard setup
Make sure we destroy all zk clients
Fix a problem with deployment agent when updating bundles
Enhance agent to support other urls protocols
Let count be configurable in batch sender so different wacky combinations of batch/count can be used
Minor improvements in jmx domains synchronization -  Fixed removal of domain -
adding fabric-activemq feature  fixing scala-repo problem for agents
[FABRIC-15] Add support for updating etc/config - properties and etc/system - properties
made the sample a little simpler
refactored the fabric manifest entry names to be a little neater

commit_message: Make sure unregistered fabs get registered as they get deployed -
Avoid resolving the test scope dependences -
Also auto install bundle transitive deps -
Fix compile error -
Update some more versions embedded in the code
Fix a couple matching gotchas with importing  make -d on import only apply to matched paths  make -d not applicable when importing a properties file
added bundle version
added more useful exception error message so its easier to deduce which dependency brings in an unresolvable dependency
temporary hack to fix fab:start - ideally we need to wait for dependent bundles to start first (within some time window I guess) before trying to start the fab
temporary hack to fix fab:start - ideally we need to wait for dependent bundles to start first (within some time window I guess) before trying to start the fab
Dont think its really necessary to delete these keys first
Add the FuseSource maven repo to fabric-maven-proxy since fabric-core-ssh-agent is using a FuseSource karaf build -   Also add some additional logging to help troubleshoot problems -
use proper URL
Add the local repo to the list of remote repositories so artifacts can be located there too
Add some logging  also only apply config updates introduced in commit ed695d6edd0c9f06f5e2 if the fabric - profiles property is set  otherwise messes up creating the initial cluster
dont start or hide bundle fragments
Support an --overwrite command so that zk:create can be used to create or update an entry -
in the case of --features  --bundles  or --repositories  the edit-profile command  can now omit the key= part  an automatic key will be used based on the value -
zk backing engine - properly delete users
trim role names
Fix imports -
temporarly fix password preffix/suffix problem
Add easy method to find what agents are associated with a profile
fix installer script problems - wait for zk client to connect
Fix typo in method names
Updated unit tests
Added getProfile() to Profile - java
Made Import - java properties protected to use in tests that import ZK setup
Added support for system property cluster - auto - start that will automatically start a zookeeper cluster  when set -
Fixed some issues with the way that artifact url is calculated in the AgentProviderUtils -
Look for existing fabric-configadmin bundle before trying to install it so FabricClusterServiceImpl can work in pojosr too
enabled things like camel-blueprint to be automatically installed - with an overly aggressive detection; lets turn down the hack when we use the BlueprintAnalyser with bnd
Added support for passing username & password to the child URI -
adding provision result/exception to the api and shell command
Fixed ProfileOverlay supplement calls
upgraded jackson and used a better default JSON serialization
added better help to the commands
Cleanup the output of integration tests  so that its more visible of what the state of the test is -  Added after test method that cleans up created agents -
Upgradd to Hadoop 1 - 0 - 0 release -
deal with possible whitespace in the parent profile names (often caused by newlines when exporting/importing to/from files to/from ZK)
Aligned tests with scripts -
handle missing JMX details a little more gracefully
[FABRICPRV-60] Modified import/export commands to handle profile parents as part of the agent properites -
Renamed property CLUSTER_AUTOSTART to ENSEMBLE_AUTOSTART -
[FABRICPRV-76] Added verbose output support for container-list which includes jmx and ssh urls -
ZookeeperConfigAdminBridge will handle multiple zookeeper managed services -
Temporarily removed framework from default profile -
FABRIC-74: container-list is sorted by container id
FABRICPRV-100: Better error message if creating fabric when already exists -
cluster-list uses  -  to represent current cluster if you use cluster-list fusemq/default
Misc fixes -
add containerName to the log events
Updated to pax-exam-karaf 0 - 5 - 1 -  Misc test improvements -
Tuned pax-exam bundles start-level to avoid the probe not started issue -
Integration test improvements -
FAB-19: Dont navigate transitive dependencies for provided dependencies that are preinstalled
Minor fix in esb profile long test -
Added logging for framework errors that can occur while the deployment agent refreshes bundles -
[FABRICPRV-147] Add an api to easily identify if a container is part of the zookeeper ensemble
[FABRICPRV-163] fabric-jaas bundle is now installed when creating/joining ensemble -
[FABRICPRV-166] Name is properlly generated when creating multiple remote nodes -
[ENTMQ-15] Replaced call to ConfigurationAdmin - getConfiguration with listConfigurations to avoid binding pid to bundles -
[FABRICPRV-171] profile-edit now uses a / delimeter to separate pids with keys -
Integration tests now add the fusesource milestone repo to the default profile before running -
Zk client now notifies the added listener instead of all when a new listener is registered -  Karaf container registration is using a lock instead of a semaphore -
Fixed startlevel for tests -
diff:
diff --git a/fabric/fabric-itests/fabric-pax-exam/src/test/java/org/fusesource/fabric/itests/paxexam/FabricTestSupport.java b/fabric/fabric-itests/fabric-pax-exam/src/test/java/org/fusesource/fabric/itests/paxexam/FabricTestSupport.java
index 1802c98a8ee..2951d91f560 100644

+++ b/fabric/fabric-itests/fabric-pax-exam/src/test/java/org/fusesource/fabric/itests/paxexam/FabricTestSupport.java
@@ -218,8 +218,8 @@ protected Option fabricDistributionConfiguration() {
                 new Option[]{karafDistributionConfiguration().frameworkUrl(
                         maven().groupId(GROUP_ID).artifactId(ARTIFACT_ID).versionAsInProject().type("tar.gz"))
                         .karafVersion(getKarafVersion()).name("Fabric Karaf Distro").unpackDirectory(new File("target/paxexam/unpack/")),
-                        useOwnExamBundlesStartLevel(40),
-                      editConfigurationFilePut("etc/config.properties", "karaf.startlevel.bundle", "35"),
+                        useOwnExamBundlesStartLevel(50),
+                      editConfigurationFilePut("etc/config.properties", "karaf.startlevel.bundle", "50"),
                       mavenBundle("org.fusesource.tooling.testing","pax-exam-karaf", MavenUtils.getArtifactVersion("org.fusesource.tooling.testing","pax-exam-karaf"))
                 });
     }

commit_message: Modified output of create commands to display additional information contained in the create metadata -
[FABRICPRV-186] Container now has a property which states if its a managed container or not -  Commands aligned to use the managed property -
[ENTESB-46] Profile display command now also displays system properties  config properties and agent properties if they are present in the profile -
itest mq - fixing jmx problem
[FABRICPRV-213] Fixed a possible NoNode exception when a node with substitute data doesnt exists -
Fixed ssh container creation and ensemble-add  which were broken after the introduction of resolvers -
diff:
diff --git a/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ContainerProviderUtils.java b/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ContainerProviderUtils.java
index 9a7209b6fd5..e71f5349909 100644
--- a/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ContainerProviderUtils.java
+++ b/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ContainerProviderUtils.java
@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ public static String buildInstallAndStartScript(CreateContainerOptions options)
         sb.append("run cd `").append(FIRST_FABRIC_DIRECTORY).append("`\n");
         List<String> lines = new ArrayList<String>();
         lines.add(ZkDefs.GLOBAL_RESOLVER_PROPERTY + "=" + options.getResolver());
-        appendFile(sb, "etc/startup.properties", lines);
+        appendFile(sb, "etc/system.properties", lines);
         replaceLineInFile(sb, "etc/system.properties", "karaf.name=root", "karaf.name = " +options.getName());
         replaceLineInFile(sb,"etc/org.apache.karaf.shell.cfg","sshPort=8101","sshPort="+DEFAULT_SSH_PORT);
         appendFile(sb, "etc/system.properties",Arrays.asList("\n"));
diff --git a/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperClusterServiceImpl.java b/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperClusterServiceImpl.java

+++ b/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperClusterServiceImpl.java
@@ -341,7 +341,7 @@ public void createCluster(List<String> containers) {
             String realConnectionUrl = "";
             String containerList = "";
             for (String container : containers) {
-                String ip = zooKeeper.getStringData(ZkPath.CONTAINER_IP.getPath(container));
+                String ip = ZooKeeperUtils.getSubstitutedData(zooKeeper,ZkPath.CONTAINER_IP.getPath(container));
                 String profNode = "/fabric/configs/versions/" + version + "/profiles/fabric-ensemble-" + newClusterId + "-" + Integer.toString(index);
                 String pidNode = profNode + "/org.fusesource.fabric.zookeeper.server-" + newClusterId + ".properties";
                 Properties pidNodeProperties = new Properties();
diff --git a/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperUtils.java b/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperUtils.java
index 2bf0338d62d..f771a66c206 100644
--- a/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperUtils.java
+++ b/fabric/fabric-core/src/main/scala/org/fusesource/fabric/internal/ZooKeeperUtils.java
@@ -160,7 +160,8 @@ public static void setProperties(IZKClient zooKeeper, String path, Properties pr
 
     public static String getSubstitutedData(final IZKClient zooKeeper,String path) throws InterruptedException, KeeperException, IOException, URISyntaxException {
         Map<String, String> props = new HashMap<String, String>();
-        if (zooKeeper.exists(path) != null) {
+        String normaledPath = path != null && path.contains("#") ? path.substring(0,path.lastIndexOf("#")) : path;
+        if (normaledPath != null && zooKeeper.exists(normaledPath) != null) {
             String data = new String(ZkPath.loadURL(zooKeeper, path), "UTF-8");
 
             props.put("data", data);

commit_message: [FABRICPRV-225] ssh options now properly return default port  if none is specified directly or as part of the provider url -
[FABRICPRV-193] Windows realted fixes on fabric-agent and fabric-maven-proxy -
Make sure the agent can update itself
Changed default ssh container provider retries to 1  for faling fast unless explicitly specified -
[FABRICPRV-233] Fixed the display of container-list to properly display children and local container -
added a helper method getMavenRepoUploadURI() we can use from tools such as IDE to know where to deploy to for a fabric
Deployment agent now sorts the fabric maven proxies in the same manner that that the fabric service does -
Fixed NPE when uninstalling the fabric-maven-proxy bundle -
Added a sleep period in example camel profile itest  so that we give time to some exchanges to complete before the assertion -
FABRICPRV-231 polish the cxf demo for integration test

         </dependency>

commit_message: Added a utility method for initializing container path  so that it can be used for cases where config admin bridge starts before the paths are actually created -
Fixed no node exceptions and concurrent modification exceptions when unregistering a maven proxy -
one more fix for FABRICPRV-271  lets be really explicit with the MacRomans already!
refactored the com - fusesource -> org - fusesource
